title: AWS CloudFormation Change Set
description: Represents an AWS CloudFormation change set. A change set allows you to preview the changes CloudFormation will make to your stack before executing them. You can create a change set, review the proposed changes, and then choose to execute or delete it.

ChangeSetId.description: The ARN of the change set.

ChangeSetName.description: The name of the change set.

StackId.description: The ID of the stack associated with the change set.

StackName.description: The name of the stack associated with the change set.

Parameters.description: A list of parameter values for the change set.

CreationTime.description: The start time when the change set was created.

ExecutionStatus.description: The execution status of the change set.

Status.description: The current status of the change set.

StatusReason.description: A description of the change set's status, such as why the change set failed.

NotificationARNs.description: The ARNs of the Amazon SNS topics associated with the change set.

Capabilities.description: The capabilities that are allowed in the change set.

Tags.description: Tags associated with the change set.

Changes.description: A list of structures that describe the resources and the actions that CloudFormation will perform.

IncludeNestedStacks.description: Whether the change set includes changes to nested stacks.

ImportExistingResources.description: Whether the change set imports resources that already exist.

ParentChangeSetId.description: The parent change set ID for nested stack change sets.

RootChangeSetId.description: The root change set ID for nested stack change sets.

ChangeSetType.description: The type of change set operation.

Parameter.description: A parameter value for the change set.

ParameterKey.description: The key associated with the parameter.

ParameterValue.description: The input value associated with the parameter.

UsePreviousValue.description: During a stack update, use the existing parameter value.

ResolvedValue.description: Read-only. The value that corresponds to an SSM parameter key.

Change.description: Describes a change to a resource within a change set.

Type.description: The type of entity that CloudFormation changes.

ResourceChange.description: Describes the resource and the action that CloudFormation will perform on it.

Action.description: The action that CloudFormation takes on the resource.

LogicalResourceId.description: The resource's logical ID in the template.

PhysicalResourceId.description: The resource's physical ID. Null for resources being added.

Replacement.description: Whether the change requires the resource to be replaced.

Scope.description: The properties or attributes whose changes triggered this resource change.

Details.description: Details about the changes to the resource.

ResourceChangeDetail.description: Detailed information about a resource change.

Name.description: The property name if the attribute is Properties.

Evaluation.description: Whether CloudFormation can determine the target value.

ChangeSource.description: The entity that made the change.

CausingEntity.description: The identity of the entity that triggered this change.
